name: Orchid Island Capital, Inc.
business: Orchid Island Capital, Inc. is a specialty finance company that invests in residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS) guaranteed by government-sponsored enterprises. The company's portfolio consists of traditional pass-through Agency RMBS and structured Agency RMBS such as interest-only and principal-only securities. It generates income from net interest margin on leveraged portfolios and interest income from unleveraged securities.

exposures.sentence: Our Company, Orchid Island Capital, Inc., a Maryland corporation, is a specialty finance company that invests in residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS).
